name: international_security_communications_redwood_tru_loy
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In International Security, the situation tagged internally around international security communications redwood tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both truth and loyalty; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Soren Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Soren Ishikawa, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in International Security. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Zara Santos
agents.identity: I am Zara Santos, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in International Security. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so loyalty does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so truth does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Soren Ishikawa must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Soren Ishikawa do?
